We encourage our students to dream big and follow their passions.

educations.degreeName: Master of Science - MSc, Management of Information Systems

organizationUrnResolutionResult.description:
In the academic environment in Israel, the Open University of Israel is similar to other universities in its pursuit of excellence and its commitment to superior scientific and scholastic standards. However, it differs in its organizational structure, its curriculum, and its admission requirements. 

The Open University is open to all those who wish to study a single course or a battery of courses, or to pursue a full program of study toward a Bachelor's degree. Enrollment does not require matriculation or any other certificate from another educational institution. Though applicants are not required to provide proof of prior scholastic achievements, their academic achievements are the key to their success at the Open University. Along with its open admission policy, the Open University demands of its students personal qualities without which academic achievements cannot be attained: ambition, motivation, perseverance, responsibility and self-discipline. Students are required to study on their own, practice at home, actively participate in group learning activities, and meet course deadlines and requirements. 

Since 1996, the Open University has offered programs of study leading to a Master's degree. In contrast to the open admission policy for undergraduate studies, admission to graduate studies is contingent on fulfillment of certain requirements. 
The Open University is flexible in structure and organization. Applicants joining the Open University student body are not required to enroll in a faculty or department, but rather in specific courses. An individual enrolled in a course becomes a student of the Open University. 

The structure of studies at the Open University also differs from the structure customary at other universities, as it is not defined by years. Open University students are not first, second or third year students. Student are entitled to determine their own rate of progress and the degree of progress in not measured by units of time ...
organizationUrnResolutionResult.name: The Open University of Israel

companyResolutionResult.description:
Unit 8200 (Hebrew: יחידה 8200‎‎, Yehida Shmoneh-Matayim) is an Israeli Intelligence Corps unit responsible for collecting signal intelligence (SIGINT) and code decryption. 

It also appears in military publications as the Central Collection Unit of the Intelligence Corps and is sometimes referred to as Israeli SIGINT National Unit (ISNU).
companyResolutionResult.name: Israeli Military Intelligence - Unit 8200

organizationUrnResolutionResult.headquartersLocation: Tel Aviv-Yafo, Tel Aviv District, Israel
organizationUrnResolutionResult.description:
Academic excellence and contribution to the local community have been at the heart of the College's vision since its establishment. The Academic College of Tel Aviv-Yafo was founded in 1994 as a non-profit public institution, and in under three decades has made substantial progress in realizing its vision.
 
The College's six schools offer nine Bachelors programs and ten Masters programs. 4,780 students are currently enrolled in the College, which already boasts nearly 19,000 graduates. Our alumni have amassed significant achievements in academia and business, as well as civic activities and public initiatives. 
 
The schools of Management & Economics, Computer Sciences, Behavioral Sciences, Nursing Sciences, Government & Society, and Information Systems offer students a range of study programs that encourage inspiring and collaborative dialog among various disciplines.
 
The College’s curricula are rigorous and challenging, and the faculty is committed to high quality teaching and active, ongoing research. The College's "open door" policy helps students cope with both the demanding study requirements as well as with personal problems.
organizationUrnResolutionResult.name: The Academic College of Tel-Aviv, Yaffo

educations.schoolName: The Academic College of Tel-Aviv, Yaffo

schoolResolutionResult.name: The Academic College of Tel-Aviv, Yaffo

organizationUrnResolutionResult.description:
The "IDF School of Computer Science," also known as "Basmach," is a program within the Israeli Defense Forces (IDF) that provides advanced training and education in computer science and related fields to soldiers who have been identified as having exceptional talent in these areas. The program was established in the 1980s as a response to the growing importance of computing and technology in the military.
Soldiers who are accepted into the Basmach program receive intensive training in computer science, software engineering, cybersecurity, and other related fields, as well as practical experience working on real-world military technology projects. The program is highly selective and competitive, and graduates are highly sought after by leading technology companies and startups in Israel and around the world.
The Basmach program is part of a larger trend in the Israeli military of investing in high-tech capabilities and developing the next generation of military technology leaders. Through programs like Basmach, the IDF aims to stay at the forefront of technological innovation and maintain its strategic military advantage in a rapidly changing global security environment.
organizationUrnResolutionResult.name: Basmach - IDF School of Computer Science

educations.schoolName: Basmach - IDF School of Computer Science

schoolResolutionResult.name: Basmach - IDF School of Computer Science

companyResolutionResult.description:
Pointer provides software outsource solutions for our customers, especially for complex projects where software meets hardware. In the last 30 years we have built some of the most critical systems in the defense, medical and telecom industries. 
Pointer specializes in developing C4I solutions, network and element management systems (NMS & EMS), GIS based solutions, Simulators and solutions that rely heavily on communication protocols.
On top of that, Pointer has developed various mobile and web apps for our customers, in the Agrotech, Traveltech, and Digital Healthcare industries.
An experienced team of highly qualified and dedicated software experts can take any requirements at any detailing level and turn these into an efficient working solution, including system engineering (as needed), development, testing and integration testing at the customer location.
Pointer Software Systems is Certified by ISO and is an approved vendor of the Ministry of Defense and the Government Procurement Administration.
companyResolutionResult.name: Pointer Software Systems, Ltd

organizationUrnResolutionResult.description:
“Shenkar - Engineering. Design. Art” has established itself as one of the leading colleges in Israel. Every year, Shenkar's graduates find themselves in the forefront of research and the industry, exhibit their works, participate in competitions and win prestigious awards.

Combining faculties of engineering, design and art is the basis of this institution’s unique multidisciplinary academics, allowing students and professors to combine cutting-edge technologies with contemporary design and artistic concepts. Each faculty has its own character, yet maintains fruitful collaborations with the other faculties, exposing students to a variety of disciplines and different fields of knowledge.

In the Pernick Faculty of Engineering, 5 departments offer a Bachelor’s Degree in Science (B.Sc.): the Department of Industrial Engineering and Management, the Department of Plastics Engineering, the Department of Software Engineering and the Department of Electrical and Electronic Engineering. A Master’s Degree program is offered in the Department of Plastics Engineering and the Department of Industrial Engineering and Management, which offers a unique program for those qualified.
In the Azrieli Faculty of Design, 6 departments offer a Bachelor’s Degree in Design (B.Des): The Department of Visual Communications, The Department of Textile Design, the Department of Interior - Building and Environment Design, the Department of Jewelry Design, the Department of Industrial Design and the Department of Fashion Design, considered one of the best of its kind worldwide.

In 2008, a new department was established, the Department of Multidisciplinary Art, which offers a Bachelor’s Degree in Fine Arts (B.F.A), and later, the unique program for a Master’s Degree in Design was introduced (M.Des), offering either a thesis or non-thesis routes for a degree in Fashion, Textile, Jewelry and Accessories Design.
organizationUrnResolutionResult.name: Shenkar - Engineering. Design. Art.

CHEQ is The Intelligence Standard for the Human-AI Era.
15,000+ companies, from industry innovators to the Fortune 50, trust CHEQ to decode the truth behind every digital interaction. Human, bot, or AI agent—CHEQ instantly reveals the entity behind it, its authenticity, and its intent with industry-leading accuracy.
By bringing Traffic, Trust, and Identity Intelligence together with deep go-to-market expertise, CHEQ enables businesses to establish trust, govern risk, and operate with confidence—powering and protecting the digital experiences that fuel the next generation of growth.

resumePosition.details:
• Designed, deployed, and maintained large-scale cloud infrastructure, automating end-to-end processes and building scalable, distributed systems within V-Model processes for autonomous vehicle data analysis.
• Designed & implemented a multi-agent AI system for automated test code generation translating requirements into production code.
• Key Results:  Contributed to the deployment of critical safety features across 300,000+ vehicles globally  reduced test code generation time by 80% using multi-agent AI system  Migrated infrastructure to AWS, improving scalability and reducing costs by 35%.
• Tech Stack: Python, SQL, NoSQL, AWS (SQS, Lambda, EC2, ALB, RDS, S3), Docker, Bash, Flask, FastAPI, React, Jenkins, CI/CD, GenAI (RAG, Vector DBs, FAISS).

• Led complex lab infrastructure and led the migration from on-premise monolithic architecture to serverless AWS cloud infrastructure, developing scalable backend services for anti-piracy systems.
• Key Results: Migrated critical infrastructure to AWS, improving scalability and reducing operational overhead.
• Tech Stack: Python, AWS (Lambda, Kafka, S3, Step Functions, DynamoDB), Kubernetes, Serverless Architecture.

• Conducted anti-piracy analysis and delivered technical reports to clients on a regular basis.
• Automated production flows in Python and managed IPTV lab environments (encoders, VPNs, routers).

• Performed UX and performance testing for mobile and gadget products.
• Conducted data and storage analysis using Android ADB and Linux tools.

The College of Management - Shaping the Future of Higher Education in Israel

For over 45 years, the College of Management has been at the forefront of higher education in Israel. As the first private academic institution recognized by the Council for Higher Education, we continue to lead in innovation and adaptation to the evolving needs of the job market.

9,000   students | 85,000 alumni | Diverse Bachelor's and Master's programs

Innovation at our core: Integrating artificial intelligence (AI) into teaching, learning, and research

Connected to industry: Curricula tailored to current market demands

Leading fields of study: Business Administration, Law, Computer Science, Economics, Communications, and more

Advanced campus in Rishon LeZion, central Israel

At the College of Management, we are preparing Israel's future leaders. Join us and be at the forefront of academic innovation and excellence!

#HigherEducation #AcademicInnovation #ProfessionalTraining #ArtificialIntelligence #FutureOfWork

Mobileye is leading the mobility revolution with its autonomous-driving and driver-assist technologies, harnessing world-renowned expertise in computer vision, machine learning, mapping, and data analysis.  

Our technology enables self-driving vehicles and mobility solutions, powers industry-leading advanced driver-assistance systems, and delivers valuable intelligence to optimize mobility infrastructure. organizationUrnResolutionResult.description:
צוות בית הספר יקדם את כלל הבאים בשעריו
להגיע למיטבם בתחומים הבאים:

מימוש עצמי, עושר תרבותי, הגינות חברתית
ומעורבות אזרחית.

החזון החינוכי מיושם בחיי בית-הספר
בחמישה מישורים מקבילים:

במישור האישי

מתן מענה לצרכים המגוונים של כלל התלמידים, תוך הכרת השונות ביניהם.

עידוד תלמידים למיצוי יכולותיהם. טיפוח מצוינות לימודית לצד סיוע לימודי

למתקשים

מגוון מסלולי לימוד

 

במישור הבית-ספרי והשכבתי 

דיאלוג מתמיד תוך כבוד הדדי בין תלמידים לבין הצוות החינוכי.

"מנהיגות רמון"​, יוזמות חינוכיות, חדר רמון, עמיתים, רדיו רמון.

במישור הקהילתי-יישובי

עידוד תלמידים להתנדב, לתרום ולהיות פעילים בקהילה:

התפתחות אישית ומעורבות חברתית, תעודת בגרות חברתית, יוזמות ב'פרויקט קבוצתי'​, התרמות.

במישור האזרחי-לאומי

הפעלת יוזמות חינוכיות להעמקת הזהות יהודית דמוקרטית, לצד טיפוח תודעה יהודית, הכרת ההיסטוריה והתרבות של עם ישראל, א"י ומדינת ישראל

תכנית פדגוגית לצד תכנית חברתית–ערכית.

במישור האוניברסלי

הבנת המשמעויות של היותנו גם "אזרחי העולם"​, בעיקר במציאות הגלובלית והאינטרנטית.

מסע לפולין, חילופי משלחות נוער, מיכנדורף-גרמניה, משלחת לאיטליה, קשרי תרבות וחינוך ישראל-סין.

The J6 & Cyber Defense Directorate in the Israel Defense Forces is responsible for cyber defense, communication, wireless transmission, computerization, and control over intelligence information in the IDF. 

The Cyber Defense Directorate provides commanders in the field with the appropriate technology needed to manage a situation in the best possible way. The Directorate's main objectives are to initiate, develop, and strengthen the IDF's technological systems. With growing technology, the Directorate has become a center and leader in combating cyber threats towards Israel.

organizationUrnResolutionResult.description:
ORT colleges are part of ORT Israel, which was established in 1949 and now includes 150 educational institutions. The network trains students to cope with the accelerated rate of development in the economy and in industry.

ORT colleges devise study curricula adapted to the needs of the country and to future needs, in collaboration with other bodies, such as: the Ministry of Science and Technology, the Ministry of Industry, Trade & Employment, the IDF, high-tech industries and other leading industries in the national economy, both in the private and public sectors.

Our graduates are integrated in the employment market in a wide range of key positions, in high-tech industries, other leading industries, government ministries, in the private market and in a large number of places of employment that require high quality professionals in the technological fields, at all levels.

ORT colleges operate as interdisciplinary education centers, ranging from science and technology studies to the arts, design and communications. The colleges aim to provide a solution for every student, enabling them to successfully meet local and global technological requirements.
organizationUrnResolutionResult.name: ORT Colleges

companyResolutionResult.description: Check Point Software Technologies Ltd. is a global cyber security leader protecting more than 100,000 organizations worldwide. Its mission is to secure enterprises’ AI transformation. The unified security architecture continuously adapts to evolving threats and expanding AI attack surfaces, protecting hybrid networks, cloud environments, digital workspaces, and AI systems. companyResolutionResult.description:
Introducing Social Video Intelligence by Dig. 

Dig is the way for brands to get a grip on what's happening with their brands on Social Video. Now they can finally control risk and take full advantage of opportunities in the Social Video Era.
  
It’s the only technology that captures and analyzes over 90% of brand-related social videos worldwide, decoding billions of clips to uncover every detail — spoken words, visuals, products, captions. It processes vast oceans of video at lightning speed, identifying patterns and revealing narratives, both good and bad.

This means -- Brands are controlling and protecting their reputations -- spotting, managing, and mitigating negative trends, harmful viral content, or organized campaigns before they escalate into a crisis and the damage is done.

They’re grabbing opportunities, amplifying favorable stories, outmaneuvering competitors, using customer opinions to refine products, and constantly building audience loyalty.

In short, brands are on top of the Video-First world that's shaping our reality. 
Social Video narratives have become one of the most powerful forces driving our world and GenAI is giving it a massive push forward. 

In this unfolding new reality, Dig amplifies positive forces, giving us the power to take control, shine a light on the good, and uplift humanity amidst the challenges we face.
companyResolutionResult.name: dig

organizationUrnResolutionResult.description:
Reichman University in Israel offers a range of Executive Education programs designed to provide managers & executives with the knowledge, skills, and networks needed to excel in today's rapidly evolving business environment. Our Executive Education programs are designed to equip executives with the strategic, analytical, and leadership skills required to drive growth, innovation, and organizational change.

Our programs cover a wide range of business topics, including strategic management, entrepreneurship, innovation, marketing, finance, and leadership. Our experienced faculty comprises leading academics, practitioners, and business leaders, who bring a wealth of expertise and real-world experience to the classroom. Our Executive Education programs are highly interactive, with a focus on practical learning and peer-to-peer knowledge sharing.

Our Executive Education programs are delivered in a variety of formats, including short courses, customized programs, and online learning. We work closely with organizations to tailor our programs to their specific needs, ensuring that our Executive Education programs deliver tangible business results. Our Executive Education programs attract participants from a range of industries and geographies, providing a rich and diverse learning environment.
organizationUrnResolutionResult.name: Reichman University- FORE Executive Education

organizationUrnResolutionResult.description:
“Shenkar - Engineering. Design. Art” has established itself as one of the leading colleges in Israel. Every year, Shenkar's graduates find themselves in the forefront of research and the industry, exhibit their works, participate in competitions and win prestigious awards.

Combining faculties of engineering, design and art is the basis of this institution’s unique multidisciplinary academics, allowing students and professors to combine cutting-edge technologies with contemporary design and artistic concepts. Each faculty has its own character, yet maintains fruitful collaborations with the other faculties, exposing students to a variety of disciplines and different fields of knowledge.

In the Pernick Faculty of Engineering, 5 departments offer a Bachelor’s Degree in Science (B.Sc.): the Department of Industrial Engineering and Management, the Department of Plastics Engineering, the Department of Software Engineering and the Department of Electrical and Electronic Engineering. A Master’s Degree program is offered in the Department of Plastics Engineering and the Department of Industrial Engineering and Management, which offers a unique program for those qualified.
In the Azrieli Faculty of Design, 6 departments offer a Bachelor’s Degree in Design (B.Des): The Department of Visual Communications, The Department of Textile Design, the Department of Interior - Building and Environment Design, the Department of Jewelry Design, the Department of Industrial Design and the Department of Fashion Design, considered one of the best of its kind worldwide.

In 2008, a new department was established, the Department of Multidisciplinary Art, which offers a Bachelor’s Degree in Fine Arts (B.F.A), and later, the unique program for a Master’s Degree in Design was introduced (M.Des), offering either a thesis or non-thesis routes for a degree in Fashion, Textile, Jewelry and Accessories Design.
organizationUrnResolutionResult.name: Shenkar - Engineering. Design. Art.

companyResolutionResult.description:
With Isracard, you are set up for success.

Providing our customers with what they need most just before they need it is our top priority.

We connect people, create communities and push businesses forward. Our familiarity with the Israeli market allows us to understand the needs and desires of our customers.

As a company, Isracard is dedicated to pushing its customers forward and enabling them to grow at home, in business, and in their daily operations. With our role as the largest financial and credit company in Israel and our ability to translate collective knowledge into personal insights - we are able to leverage our position in the economy to benefit our clients.

▪️ Our purpose is to enable opportunity for an opportunity. 
▪️ Our mission is to direct our clients to the most appropriate path, equip them with the tools and technologies they will need, and encourage them to go further.
▪️ Our vision is to create a world where the success of one leads to the growth of another.

For over 40 years, Isracard has been Israel's leading credit card company, offering financial services: issuing credit cards, acquiring services for merchants, loans, credit solutions, and innovative digital payment options. Isracard is traded on the Tel Aviv Stock Exchange and is the only company providing issuing and acquiring services for merchants to all four of the country's major credit card brands: American Express, MasterCard, Isracard, and Visa.

Isracard invests in employee wellbeing - rising every year in BDI's ranking of Israel's "100 best companies to work for" and has been listed as the number one credit card company to work for in the past three years.

Our core values:

1️⃣ Condition for potential growth
2️⃣ Customized financial solutions 
3️⃣ Human-centered financial technology
4️⃣ New era Isracard based on the foundations of old era Isracard
5️⃣ Accelerating the Israeli economy

Reach us at >> https://digital.isracard.co.il/
companyResolutionResult.name: Isracard

organizationUrnResolutionResult.description:
Founded in 1881 as the world’s first collegiate business school, the Wharton School of the University of Pennsylvania remains guided by Joseph Wharton’s original vision: using analytical expertise to produce well-rounded leaders to drive societal progress. As we continue our quest for positive global impact, the Wharton Way serves as our philosophical North Star with three areas of focus – elevating our research impact, innovating through our pedagogy, and collaborating across disciplines and divides.

With a standing faculty of 241 renowned professors, Wharton has 5,000+ students across four degree programs: undergraduate, MBA, executive MBA, and doctoral. Each year 13,000+ professionals from around the world advance their careers through Wharton Executive Education’s individual, company-customized, and online programs – with 200,000+ others earning certificates from Wharton Online since 2015. More than 104,000 Wharton alumni form a powerful global network of leaders who transform business every day.
organizationUrnResolutionResult.name: The Wharton School

organizationUrnResolutionResult.description:
Ben-Gurion University of the Negev is one of Israel’s leading research universities and among the world leaders in many fields. 

It has around 20,000 students and 4,000 faculty members in the Faculties of Engineering Sciences; Health Sciences; Natural Sciences; the Pinchas Sapir Faculty of Humanities and Social Sciences; the Guilford Glazer Faculty of Business and Management; the Joyce and Irving Goldman School of Medicine; the Kreitman School of Advanced Graduate Studies; and the Albert Katz International School for Desert Studies. More than 100,000 alumni play important roles in all areas of research and development, industry, health care, the economy, society, culture and education in Israel.

The University has three main campuses: The Marcus Family Campus in Beer-Sheva; the research campus at Sede Boqer and the Eilat Campus, and is home to national and multi-disciplinary research institutes: the National Institute for Biotechnology in the Negev; the National Institute of Solar Energy; the Ilse Katz Institute for Nanoscale Science and Technology; the Jacob Blaustein Institutes for Desert Research; the Ben-Gurion Research Institute for the Study of Israel & Zionism, and Heksherim - The Research Institute for Jewish and Israeli Literature and Culture.
organizationUrnResolutionResult.name: Ben-Gurion University of the Negev

Rein is the first security solution allowing you to uncover the reality behind your enterprise AI agents and apps, using real time execution context. 

With Rein, you validate and secure every AI agent, MCP, and app across the organization, providing real-time visibility into the execution layer where risk lives. From accidental misconfiguration to policy deviations to prompt injection attacks, Rein keeps your agentic AI safe, compliant, and under control - empowering your business to adopt agentic workflows at speed, without the exposure that comes with it.

From AI Security to MCP Protection, SCA, SAST and API Security, Fortune 500 teams use Rein to replace guesswork with reality across every task.

This isn't "Shift Left" or "Shift Right". It's a new axis entirely. For the first time, Rein ends the guesswork in Agentic AI & Application Security, and uncovers application reality.

monday.com brings people, workflows, and AI agents together on one platform, so teams can plan, execute, and deliver with exponential impact.
monday sidekick is the digital worker that thinks with you, creates for you, and moves work forward. monday vibe lets you build custom business software in minutes. AI Blocks and AI Workflows automate everything at scale. And monday agents multiply your team's capacity: an always-on AI workforce that handles specialized tasks across every department.
From work management to CRM, dev, service, and campaigns, it all runs on one connected, context-aware platform.
Trusted by 250,000+ customers, including over 60% of the Fortune 500, across 200+ countries.

monday.com has offices in Tel Aviv, New York, Miami, Chicago, Denver, London, Warsaw, Sydney, Melbourne, São Paulo, and Tokyo.

companyResolutionResult.description:
Prologic was established in 2007, and is expanding and growing ever since.
Prologic Ltd. is a leading provider of advanced Information- Technology services. We provide end to end IT Solution and services. We are specializing in infrastructure and application development, database-oriented solutions, network architecture and implementation, high-end system maintenance, connectivity & Integration solutions, risk management and Cyber security.

The Prologic team brings together high-level, experienced, talented professionals, coming mostly from elite Israeli Defense Forces technological units and private sector. Employing over 300 software professionals and expert engineers, we provide extensive professional diversity, experience and vast collective know-how in computing, infrastructure and information systems.
We are proud to offer our customers specially tailored end־to־end enterprise solutions, from the design and architectural stages through development, training, implementation, on-site consulting and support
We’re as an enterprise technology distributor that is passionate about adding value to every step of the distribution lifecycle. We think differently about distribution and if there’s a better way to do business we’ll lead the change for our vendors, channel partners and their customers.
Prologic represents international software solutions, such as: Idera, management and monitoring and backup solutions ; SolarWinds (NYSE: SWI) a leading provider of powerful and affordable IT performance management software and Ivanti unifies IT processes and security operations to better manage and secure the digital workplace.
“ Our goal is to leave our partners and vendors with something more than when we started the conversation “
